default.speaker: Marcus
default.text: Ah, a new counselor! Did you know this camp was founded in 1968?

default.speaker: Pink Panther
default.text: I did not. And you are?

default.speaker: Marcus
default.text: Marcus. I know everything about everything. Ask me anything!

default.speaker: Pink Panther
default.text: Alright. What's the most interesting thing about this camp?

default.speaker: Marcus
default.text: Statistically, the mess hall food has a 73 percent chance of being inedible.

default.speaker: Marcus
default.text: But I also love drawing! Want to see my sketches? I drew the whole campfire!

default.speaker: Pink Panther
default.text: Very impressive. You've got talent, Marcus.

post.speaker: Marcus
post.text: Did you know butterflies taste with their feet? It's TRUE!

strange.speaker: Marcus
strange.text: It's WRONG! The picture is WRONG!

strange.speaker: Marcus
strange.text: I keep drawing this woman's face... but I've NEVER seen her before!

strange.speaker: Marcus
strange.text: And these frames... ornate golden frames... and rooftops I've never visited!

strange.speaker: Marcus
strange.text: It's a museum. A HUGE museum. The biggest in the world!

strange.speaker: Marcus
strange.text: There's a glass pyramid in front of it... and inside, a painting that everyone stares at...

strange.speaker: Marcus
strange.text: But something is MISSING from the picture! I can feel it!

strange.speaker: Pink Panther
strange.text: A glass pyramid... the biggest museum... That sounds like the Louvre in Paris.

strange.speaker: Marcus
strange.text: I've never been to Paris! But I can't stop drawing it!

postStrange.speaker: Marcus
postStrange.text: The woman's face again... the golden frames... something is missing...

postStrange.speaker: Marcus
postStrange.text: I filled twelve pages last night. I can't stop.
